parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  secret: $env.AXON_INBOUND_SECRET,
  source: 'facebook_ads',
  e164: $json.e164,
  first_name: $json.first_name,
  last_name: $json.last_name,
  name: $json.name,
  email: $json.email,
  metadata: {
    lead_id: $json.lead_id,
    lead_created_at: $json.created_time,
    facebook_page_id: $json.page_id,
    facebook_form_id: $json.form_id,
    facebook_ad_id: $json.ad_id,
    raw: $json.raw,
  },
}) }}
